meta.label: event
meta.content: Something that happens at a time, optionally bounded. Use `event` for incidents, refuellings, harvests, meetings — anything previously tempted to become its own component. Affected entities are linked via `relation` (predicate=participates_in / affects).

kind.description: incident | refuel | harvest | meeting | arrival | departure | sighting | transaction | ...

_provenance.rationale: Added `kind` and `summary` so domain-specific events (incident, refuel) can be expressed as `event` entities composed with `quantity`, `location`, and `relation` rather than each becoming its own component.
